title: pratia surrepens
intro: Pratia surrepens, also known as blue flower or forget-me-not flower, is a small, perennial plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pratia surrepens include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Pratia surrepens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with its leaves and flowers being used to make these preparations.
